hero.subheadline: Transform raw data into beautiful, compliant, and easily embeddable charts and dashboards. Graph Italia is the complete, open-source toolkit designed to bridge the gap between non-technical content creators and modern web integration.

why.label: Why Graph Italia?
why.title: Born from real institutional needs.
why.body: Born from the need to display transparent, accessible, and responsive data on Italian institutional websites, Graph Italia guarantees design best practices out-of-the-box. Whether you are a developer looking for a robust React charting library, or an organization needing a complete platform to manage and publish dashboards, Graph Italia adapts to your needs.

features.label: Feature Summary
features.title: Everything you need, in one place.
features.subtitle: Graph Italia isn't just a charting library — it's a complete workflow for data publishing.

items.title: Versatile Chart Types
items.description: Bar, Line, Pie charts, GeoJSON geographic maps, interactive Cluster maps, KPI indicators, and dynamic Data Tables — all accessible and responsive.

items.title: Smart Data Ingestion
items.description: Upload local CSV/JSON files or connect to remote URLs. Graph Italia automatically caches remote data and refreshes it every 24 hours to keep your sites fast.

items.title: No-Code Visual Builder
items.description: Non-technical users can map data columns, customize colors, configure legends, and build drag-and-drop dashboard layouts — no code required.

items.title: Secure & Organized
items.description: Built-in authentication and project isolation. Organize charts and dashboards into Projects with role-based access and per-project API keys.

items.title: Accessibility First
items.description: Built as a wrapper around Apache ECharts and OpenLayers, our components strictly adhere to web accessibility standards and UI/UX best practices.

items.title: Open Source
items.description: Released under GNU GPL v3. Built to be shared, adapted, and reused by other organizations, agencies, and developers worldwide.

integration.label: Seamless Integration via API Keys
integration.title: Integrate in three steps.
integration.subtitle: The core mission of Graph Italia is to let you easily embed your creations into your own websites with a secure, project-based API key system.

steps.title: Create & Configure
steps.body: Upload your data and design charts or dashboards using our visual Web App.

steps.title: Generate Your Keys
steps.body: Inside your Project settings, generate a secure API Key. It acts as a read-only bearer token — your data is safely exposed only where you want it.

steps.title: Embed with a few lines of code
steps.body: Use our React component library. Pass the API key and Chart ID — the component fetches and renders the accessible chart automatically.

integration.codeNote: You can also embed using traditional <iframe> methods for non-React websites.

adoption.label: Open Source & Built for Reuse
adoption.title: Pick your adoption level.
adoption.subtitle: Graph Italia is a monorepo released under the GNU GPL v3 license. We offer multiple ways to adopt it depending on your technical needs.
adoption.subtitleStrong: monorepo released under the GNU GPL v3 license

levels.title: Just the React Library
levels.description: Don't need the backend? Install our pure UI React components directly via NPM. Bring your own data and use our accessible wrappers for ECharts and OpenLayers.

levels.title: Docker Compose (Full Stack)
levels.description: Want the entire platform? We provide optimized Dockerfiles for frontend and backend. Spin up your own internal instance in minutes with PostgreSQL.

levels.title: Enterprise Kubernetes (Helm)
levels.description: Ready for production at scale? Our complete Helm Chart deploys to Kubernetes with built-in DB migration hooks, user seeding, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.

cta.title: Ready to create your first chart?
cta.subtitle: Follow the step-by-step quick start guide or log in and get started in minutes.
